category.description: Category for the app in the OIN catalog

description.description: Description of the app in the OIN catalog

features.description: Features supported by the app. See app [features](/openapi/okta-management/management/application/listapplications#application/listapplications/t=response&c=200&path=&d=0/features).

id.description: ID of the app instance. Okta returns this property only for apps not in the OIN catalog.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the object was last updated

name.description: App key name. For OIN catalog apps, this is a unique key for the app definition.

signOnModes.description: Authentication mode for the app. See app [signOnMode](/openapi/okta-management/management/application/listapplications#application/listapplications/t=response&c=200&path=&d=0/signonmode).

verificationStatus.description: OIN verification status of the catalog app

website.description: Website of the OIN catalog app

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
